response.justification: Szabo brings strong foundational engineering across all required languages (JavaScript, TypeScript, C, C++, C#, Java) and has built systems handling enterprise scale (Dunnhumby: millions of requests/second microservices). However, the role is explicitly centered on experimentation platforms, feature flagging, and measurement systems—areas completely absent from the resume. While his trajectory and systems-thinking suggest capability to learn the domain, the lack of any demonstrated experience with A/B testing frameworks, experiment targeting, bias detection, or telemetry infrastructure represents a critical gap for a Principal role whose core mission is building growth and experimentation systems.
strengths: Proven technical depth across all required languages with confirmed experience at enterprise scale (microservices handling millions of requests/second)
Strong systems architect demonstrating hands-on leadership through workshops, code dojos, and mentorship alongside core engineering
14+ years progressive technical experience with recent Staff/Principal titles; shown ability to learn multiple domains and platforms
concerns: Complete absence of experimentation platform, feature flagging, or A/B testing framework experience—the core domain of this Principal role
No demonstrated work on telemetry infrastructure, metrics design, or statistical analysis of experiments despite role's emphasis on measurement systems
Unclear evidence of large-scale cross-functional leadership (coordinating Product, Data Science, Research) or multi-team influence beyond individual team contributions

key_factors.factor: Technical breadth and programming language match
